subject: AetherBot AUTH FAILURE — Action Required: Kalshi API Key
body: AetherBot logged 44x Order failed: 401 INVALID_PARAMETER errors today (April 27) and placed 0 orders. The Kalshi API key ID (AETHERBOT_KEY env var on the Mini) is rejected by Kalshi. This blocked ALL trading today. FIX STEPS: (1) Log into kalshi.com -> Settings -> API Keys. (2) Check if your key is expired or revoked. (3) If expired: click Create API Key, copy the KEY ID (NOT the private key). (4) SSH to Mini or open Terminal: export AETHERBOT_KEY="<your-new-key-id>" and add to ~/.zshrc or the .secrets env file at ~/Documents/Projects/Hyo/agents/nel/security/. (5) Restart AetherBot: launchctl kickstart gui/501/com.hyo.aetherbot (or whatever your plist is named). The RSA private key file at ~/Documents/Projects/AetherBot/AethelBot.txt is present and intact — only the KEY ID needs updating. Kai has wired the 401 detector so this will alert automatically within 15 min on future failures.
